The '''''Margaret''''' was an [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|MC40a light cruiser]] that saw service with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]].

==History==
She was scheduled to meet with the [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']], under the command of the defecting [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]]. However, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Navy]] forces arrived mid-rendezvous; in the battle that resulted, the ''Margaret'' managed to escape into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
